_comment: L.U.N. Official Release Registry — managed by CI/CD pipeline (BUILD_AND_RELEASE.ps1)
_doc: To generate a valid release entry: run `lun certify --emit-hash` on final binary, then sign with `lun-release-keygen sign <hash> --key release.key`

latest._note: Fields above are placeholders. CI must replace them with real SHA-256 + ed25519 signature before publishing.

pipeline_instructions.step_3: Set result in windows_x64 / linux_x64 / macos_arm64 fields
pipeline_instructions.step_4: Sign the hash string: `echo -n <hash> | openssl pkeyutl -sign -inkey release_ed25519.pem | xxd -p -cols 64`
pipeline_instructions.step_5: Set signature field to the hex-encoded 64-byte ed25519 signature
pipeline_instructions.step_6: Set LUN_AUTHORITY_KEY env var in CD to the hex-encoded 32-byte ed25519 public key
pipeline_instructions.step_7: Push this file to Lock-Under-Network-Registry/core_release.json on the `main` branch
